exploration_notes: The Kubernetes scheduler plugin framework is organized across 6 key files: (1) **interface.go** defines all plugin interfaces (Plugin, FilterPlugin, ScorePlugin, BindPlugin, PreFilterPlugin, PostFilterPlugin, PreScorePlugin, ReservePlugin, PermitPlugin, PreBindPlugin, PostBindPlugin, EnqueueExtensions) and the top-level Framework interface.
